revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大将軍神社]]
[[File:Statue_of_Daishōgun.jpg|right|437x437px| ]] '''Daishōgun Shrine''' (大将軍神社, Daishōgun Jinja) Daishōgun Shrine, also referred to as Daishōgun Sha (大将軍社), is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} dedicated to {{ill|Daishōgun (deity)|ja|大将軍 (方位神)|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (deity)|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}}, the god of directions. Many of these shrines originally enshrined Daishōgun, but underwent {{ill|Changes to deities in the Meiji period|ja|祭神の変更|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Changes to deities in the Meiji period|qq=}} during the Meiji era. * {{ill|Daishōgun Hachiman Shrine|ja|大将軍八神社|1=Daishōgun Hachi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Hachiman Shrine|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Hachi Shrine|qq=}} – Located in [[Kamigyō Ward]], [[:en:Kyoto City|Kyoto City]], at {{ill|Nishimachi (Kyoto)|ja|西町 (京都市上京区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishimachi (Kyoto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} on [[Ichijō Street]]. ** Nearby: {{ill|Ichijō Street Daishōgun Shopping District|ja|一条商店街|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichijō Street Daishōgun Shopping District|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (known as the Daishōgun Shopping Street and Ichijō Yōkai Street)<ref>[https://kanko.city.kyoto.lg.jp/detail.php?InforKindCode=1&ManageCode=12000011 Kyoto City Tourism Guide]</ref>. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|大将軍神社 (守山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Moriyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in [[:en:Moriyama|Moriyama]], {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, in {{ill|Furutaka (Moriyama)|ja|古高 (守山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furutaka (Moriyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Kita-ku, Kyoto)|ja|大将軍神社 (京都市北区)|1=Daishōgun Shrine (Kita-ku, Kyoto)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Kita-ku, Kyoto)|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Kita-ku, Kyoto)|qq=}} – Located in [[Kita Ward (Kyoto City)|Kita Ward]], Kyoto, in {{ill|Nishigamo|ja|西賀茂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishigamo|1=Nishigamo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q109360544}}, often called Nishigamo Daishōgun Shrine. ** {{ill|Sumino Shrine|ja|角社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumino Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sumino-yashiro) * {{ill|Murasakino Daishōgun Shrine|ja|紫野大将軍社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Murasakino Daishōgun Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 今宮神社 (京都市)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 今宮神社 (京都市)|1=Imamiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q500955}} – A subsidiary shrine at {{ill|Imamiya Shrine (Kyoto City)|ja|今宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imamiya Shrine (Kyoto City)|1=Imamiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11376862}}, located in [[Murasakino]]. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Kyoto City Higashiyama Ward)|ja|大将軍神社 (京都市東山区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Kyoto City Higashiyama Ward)|qq=}} – Situated in [[:en:Higashiyama Ward|Higashiyama Ward]], Kyoto, near the eastern end of {{ill|Sanjō Ōhashi|en|Sanjō Ōhashi|qid=Q3087620|lt=Sanjo Bridge|1=Sanjō Ōhashi}}. Often called {{ill|Tōsanjo Daishōgun Shrine|ja|東三条大将軍神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōsanjo Daishōgun Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大将軍神社 (京都市東山区)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大将軍神社 (京都市東山区)|1=Daishōgun Shrine (Kyoto City Higashiyama Ward)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q54153258}}<ref>[http://kyoto-taisyogun.com/ Official Site], [https://kanko.city.kyoto.lg.jp/detail.php?InforKindCode=1&ManageCode=1000396 Kyoto City]</ref>. * {{ill|Okazaki Shrine|ja|岡崎神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okazaki Shrine|qq=}} – The main site includes a Daishōgun Shrine (formerly the East Tennō Shrine). * {{ill|Kōtsū Shrine|ja|交通神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōtsū Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 須賀神社 (京都市)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 須賀神社 (京都市)|1=Traffic Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17218661}} * {{ill|Fujinomori Shrine|ja|藤森神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujinomori Shrine|qq=}} – Includes a Daishōgun Shrine on its grounds. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Uji)|ja|大将軍神社 (宇治市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Uji)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Uji|en|Uji|qid=Q326956|lt=Uji|1=Uji}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, in {{ill|Ikeo (Uji)|ja|池尾|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikeo (Uji)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Osaka Tenmangū|lt=Osaka Tenmangū|lt=Daishōgun Shrine (Osaka City Kita Ward)|ja|大将軍社 (大阪市北区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Osaka City Kita Ward)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大阪天満宮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大阪天満宮}} – Found in [[Kita Ward (Osaka City)|Kita Ward]], [[:en:Osaka City|Osaka City]], near {{ill|Tenjinbashi|ja|天神橋 (大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenjinbashi|1=Tenjin Bridge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11443265}}. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Himeji City Nōnen Town)|ja|大将軍神社 (姫路市南畝町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Himeji City Nōnen Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Nōnenchō (Himeji)|ja|南畝町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōnenchō (Himeji)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内町 (姫路市)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 内町 (姫路市)|1=Uchimachi (Himeji)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q132042026}}, Himeji City, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. Currently serves as a subsidiary shrine to {{ill|Junisho Shrine (Himeji)|ja|十二所神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junisho Shrine (Himeji)|1=Jūnisho Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11404800}}. ** {{ill|Daishōgun Bridge (Himeji)|ja|大将軍橋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Bridge (Himeji)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}<ref>[http://www.e-himeji.com/enj14.htm]</ref>. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Himeji City Yumemae Town)|ja|大将軍神社 (姫路市夢前町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Himeji City Yumemae Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Situated in {{ill|Yumesaki, Hyōgo|en|Yumesaki, Hyōgo|qid=Q8061102|lt=Yumemae Town|1=Yumesaki, Hyōgo}}, Himeji City. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Himeji City Shirakuni)|ja|大将軍社 (姫路市白国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Himeji City Shirakuni)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Found in {{ill|Shirakuni (Himeji)|ja|白国 (姫路市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirakuni (Himeji)|1=Shirakuni (Himeji)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q132044248}}, Himeji City. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Nara City)|ja|大将軍神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} – Located in {{ill|Shijō Ōji|ja|四条大路|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shijō Ōji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Nara City. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Yamatokōriyama)|ja|大将軍神社 (大和郡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Yamatokōriyama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Found in {{ill|Minoshō Town|ja|美濃庄町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minoshō Town|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Ōe, Yamagata|en|Ōe, Yamagata|qid=Q377816|lt=Ōe Town (Yamatokōriyama)|1=Ōe, Yamagata}}, Yamatokōriyama. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Yufu)|ja|大将軍神社 (由布市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Yufu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Hasama Town|ja|挾間町篠原|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasama Town|1=Hasama Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q128851161}}, Yufu City, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|qid=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Kunitomi, Miyazaki)|ja|大将軍神社 (宮崎県国富町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Kunitomi, Miyazaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Found in {{ill|Honjō (Kunitomi)|ja|本庄 (国富町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honjō (Kunitomi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Kunitomi|Kunitomi]] Town, {{ill|Miyazaki Prefecture|en|Miyazaki Prefecture|qid=Q130300|lt=Miyazaki Prefecture|1=Miyazaki Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Daishōgun Shrine (Miyazaki City)|ja|大将軍神社 (宮崎市高岡町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Shrine (Miyazaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – Located in {{ill|Takaoka, Miyazaki|en|Takaoka, Miyazaki|qid=Q2749554|lt=Takaoka Town, Miyazaki|1=Takaoka, Miyazaki}}, Miyazaki City. == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Daishōgun (deity)|ja|大将軍 (方位神)|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (deity)|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}} * {{ill|Daishōgun (disambiguation)|ja|大将軍 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (disambiguation)|1=Daishōgun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15890271}} (for other uses such as place names) *** {{ill|Daishōgun, Kita Ward, Kyoto|ja|大将軍 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun, Kita Ward, Kyoto|1=Taishōgun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124296573}} * {{Prefix|Daishōgun|qq=}} * {{intitle|Daishōgun|qq=}} {{Disambiguation|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|大将軍神社|version=104167028|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:大将軍神社]]
